input.label: BIG-IP Hostname:
input.populatingSearch: sourcetype = psm_log http_protocol_indication=HTTP OR http_protocol_indication=HTTPS | stats count by hostname

input.label: Context Name:
input.populatingSearch: sourcetype = psm_log http_protocol_indication=HTTP OR http_protocol_indication=HTTPS | stats count by context_name

center.h1: Time Distribution of Events - PSM HTTP

chart.title: Action Over Time
chart.searchTemplate: sourcetype="psm_log" context_name=$context_name$ http_protocol_indication=HTTP OR http_protocol_indication=HTTPS http_security_violation != "" unit_hostname = $hostname$ | timechart count by action

chart.title: Violations Distribution Over Time
chart.searchTemplate: sourcetype="psm_log" context_name=$context_name$ http_protocol_indication=HTTP OR http_protocol_indication=HTTPS unit_hostname = $hostname$ http_security_violation != "" | timechart count by http_security_violation
